name: Mikiya Kokutou
description: __Height:__ 173 cm Shiki's friend who, two years ago, made a promise with Shiki to attend college. He discovers a doll at an exhibition his friend asked him to and falls in love with its flawless craftsmanship. He is so charmed by it that he seeks out the maker, Touko Aozaki, and then finds her residence. Tanaka states that because of Oota's caring nature, he sees Oota as the perfect candidate for marriage. He states on multiple occasions that he admires Tanaka's ability to be listless in any given situation, but also feels that Tanaka's personality causes him to miss out on things like romance and love. description: Always giving a cool look, she is a talented vocalist and plays guitar. She formed a band in the Afterlife called Girls Dead Monster with her best friend Hisako. The electric guitar that she is seen using is a Fender American Standard Stratocaster with the color of Sienna Sunburst. ~! name: Renzou Shima

Plans to become a Meister in Aria He is the 5th and youngest son of his family, and tells Konekomaru he's glad of this because it means he has less responsibilities. name: Gudrid
description: A strange woman, given the times, she wishes to be a sailing adventurer, so she stabs her husband, and flees as he is attempting to consummate their marriage. Thorfinn allows her to join them, and they set off together, attempting to outpace her spouse. ~!She later marries Thorfinn.!~

name: Kaede Kagayama
description: Owns the local candy shop and is Kazuho's underclassman. She used to babysit Renge when Renge was still a baby.

name: Harunobu Nikaidou
description: Rei's self-proclaimed "best friend" and "lifelong rival". A four-dan, he has played with Rei since they were children. Even though he might appear to be healthy, he is in fact in poor health. He is from a good family. He is modeled after real-life shōgi player Satoshi Murayama.

name: Itona Horibe
description: Transfer student who aims to kill [Koro-sensei](https://anilist.co/character/65643). He is the second assassin transfer student to arrive at Class 3-E, following the previous assassin, [Ritsu](https://anilist.co/character/74832). He initially served as the secondary antagonist, before ultimately joining Class E for good. name: Amatsuyu Kisaragi

description: A tall girl in the same grade but different class than Kasuga. She looks strikingly similar to Nakamura and likes to read. The other high school boys admire her for her looks.

name: Fumiya Tomozaki
description: Fumiya Tomozaki is a high school student who is a friendless loner and an outcast in school. To escape from his lonely existence, he dedicated himself to a fighting game called Attack Family, or 'Tackfam' for short, so much so that he's the number one ranked player in Japan, his username being nanashi. Tomozaki sees himself as a "bottom-tier character" in life: someone born unlucky and destined for loneliness. However, after meeting his online rival, [Aoi Hinami](https://anilist.co/character/136

name: Ichigo Momomiya
description: **Height:** 152 cm (5'0") Ichigo was just a normal 12-year old junior high student who was on a date with Aoyama Masaya until her DNA is mysteriously merged with the DNA of an Iriomote Wildcat. Now she is the 'leader' of a group of girls, whose DNA were also merged with that of an endangered species, called Tokyo Mew Mew. name: Matsumoto
description: Matsumoto is an AI that came to Vivy from 100 years into the future. Its mission as an AI is "to avoid the war between AI and humankind." To that end, its goal is to destroy AI with Vivy. It is talkative, overconfident, and has a personality that is not like an AI. (Source: Official Site, translated)

name: Ryouga Hibiki
description: Ryouga is Ranma Saotome's eternal rival and a friend to him, the only one he has outright stated to truly consider as such, arguably the tritagonist, and one of the most powerful fighters in the series. Ryouga's most notable characteristic is that, like his parents (and even his entire family), he has no sense of direction whatsoever. He is unable to go the right way, often sticking to the letter of any directions given to him, regardless of whether the path eventually turns. He has an inability

name: Ui Hirasawa
description: **Height:** 154 cm Ui is [Yui](https://anilist.co/character/19565/Yui-Hirasawa)'s younger sister, who begins the story as a third-year junior high school student, but later enters [Yui](https://anilist.co/character/19565/Yui-Hirasawa)'s high school the following year in the same class as [Azusa](https://anilist.co/character/21173/Azusa-Nakano). name: Amanda O'Neill
description: __Height:__ 167 cm __School:__ Luna Nova Magical Academy __Occupation:__ Witch Student Amanda is by her own description a "rebel". An unruly and fun-loving child, she has little respect for authority and is primarily motivated by hedonism.

name: Cocoa Hoto
description: **Height:** 154 cm Cocoa is a very extroverted girl, who has many dreams that she'd like to pursue, such as an international lawyer, novelist and a baker. Her motto is that everyone is a friend of hers after a mere few seconds. Because of her very optimistic, laid back and cheerful personality, she fills the people around her with happiness. name: Emu Ootori
description: __Height:__ 152 cm (5'0") Emu is a member of the musical show unit Wonderlands x Showtime. She has a cheerful yet naïve personality and is highly impulsive, acting on nearly every idea she comes up with and often dragging those around her into her plans. She has established her own personal catchphrase, “Wonderhoi!”, which she uses to motivate herself. Emu says it frequently, often shouting it at the end of her sentences.
